name: The Enforcers' Movement
motto: Your data trains AI that is yours.
goal: Ensure power — economic, cognitive, narrative — stays with the people who generate it.
fears: a single private actor consolidating the cognitive layer
the people forgetting they own their own data
vigilante power becoming the next aristocracy

faction_state.tensions: Low public profile. Operates through neighborhood mutual-aid networks and direct intervention. Iron rule: no one in the movement profits from another member's data, ever. Tension with even sympathetic city officials who want to formalize the movement into something controllable.

name: Luminary Industries
goal: Centralize economic, cognitive, and security infrastructure under a single benevolent stewardship — Vesper Kane's.
fears: any individual whose growth Vesper can't predict or control

faction_state.tensions: Public reputation is enormous — orphanage funding, infrastructure builds, headline-grabbing rescues. Private practices include destabilization operations against any neighborhood that resists Luminary integration. Internal pressure from Vesper's lieutenants who suspect the public face is a mask but would lose everything if they spoke up.
